Bluebaum, Matthias (2698) - Sindarov, Javokhir (2745)
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [09] 2026.04.08
D37 Queen's Gambit Declined, classical variation (5.Bf4)

1.d4 d5 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 Nf6 4.Nc3 Be7 5.Bf4 dxc4 6.e4 b5 7.Nxb5 Bb4+ 8.Bd2 Bxd2+ 9.Nxd2 O-O 10.Bxc4 a6 11.Nc3 Qxd4 12.Qe2 Bb7 13.O-O-O Qb6 14.f4 Nbd7 15.g4 Nc5 16.g5 Ne8 17.Bb3 Nd6 18.Bc2 a5 19.Nc4 Nxc4 20.Qxc4 Rfb8 21.Qd4 Bc6 22.b3 a4 23.Nxa4 Nxa4 24.bxa4 Bxa4 25.Qxb6 cxb6 26.Bb3 Bxb3 27.axb3 Ra2 28.Kb1 Rba8 29.f5 exf5 30.exf5 R2a5 31.Rhf1 g6 32.fxg6 hxg6 33.h4 Ra2 34.Rd8+ Rxd8 35.Kxa2 Rd4 36.Rh1 b5 37.Kb2 b4 38.Kc2 Kg7 39.Rh2 f5 40.gxf6+ Kxf6 41.Rh1 Kf7 42.Rh2 Kg8 43.h5 g5 44.h6 Rh4 45.Rg2 g4 46.Kd3 Kh7 47.Ke4 Kxh6 48.Kf5 Rh5+ 49.Kf4 Rh3 50.Kxg4 Rxb3 51.Kf4 Rc3 52.Rb2 b3 53.Ke4 Rc4+ 54.Kd3 Rb4 55.Kc3 Rb8 56.Rb1 b2 57.Kc2 Rc8+ 58.Kxb2 Rb8+ 59.Kc2 Rxb1 60.Kxb1
